idea-plugin.name: Quantum DSL (QTN) Language Support
idea-plugin.description: Syntax highlighting and Language Server support for Photon Quantum3 DSL (.qtn) files in JetBrains Rider, including autocomplete, go-to-definition, hover information, and symbols.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.1.11
  • Removed internal JetBrains Platform API usage for Rider 2026.2 EAP compatibility.
  • Updated compatibility metadata for Rider 2024.3 and later.
  • Limited Marketplace verification to Rider products.
